title: GLLVM mission control
subtitle: Local finish board for the gllvmTMB + GLLVM.jl twin. It separates branch health, draft PR checks, bridge admission, simulation evidence, public documentation, and release readiness.
source: local worktrees, handover checkpoint, GitHub CLI, and local LaunchAgent log

claim_guard.title: Claim boundary
claim_guard.text: PR green != bridge complete != release ready != scientific coverage passed. The Julia bridge is draft and partial unless a matrix row names covered evidence.

truth_cards.label: Local workspace
truth_cards.note: Dashboard evidence refresh is tracked on the #489 branch; recovery checkpoints remain untracked local handoff notes.

truth_cards.label: Draft PR
truth_cards.note: Draft PR #489 is clean and both current checks are green at 03fdda1; it remains partial and not release-ready.

truth_cards.label: Main full-check
truth_cards.note: Main R-CMD-check 27720099917 and pkgdown 27720668325 are green at 0567cd7.

truth_cards.label: Power pilot
truth_cards.note: Run 27722546237 succeeded and pushed 5969f6f, with scoring blocking coverage or power promotion. Local iter 13 reached 367010 / 480000 reps. The next scheduled run 27735802023 is in progress at 0567cd7; it has no persisted-store or scoring evidence yet.

truth_cards.label: Next decision
truth_cards.note: GLLVM.jl #95 has landed and main CI is green; #101 merge-ref and local live JuliaCall bridge suites passed, but fresh PR CI is still required before #489 widens. The CI workflow has no non-mutating manual dispatch.

active_work.text: #489 is clean and green at 03fdda1; local R bridge suites now pass, but keep it draft/partial until #101 PR CI and claim gates close.

gllvmTMB main R-CMD/pkgdown, current #489 R-CMD/recovery, GLLVM.jl main CI/Documenter, and local bridge suites are green; GLLVM.jl #101 still lacks fresh PR CI, and CI.yml exposes no workflow_dispatch trigger. Power run 27722546237 completed successfully and pushed 5969f6f, but scoring blocks coverage/power promotion; local iter 13 reached 367010 / 480000 reps. Scheduled run 27735802023 is in progress with 38 completed-success jobs and 11 in-progress jobs at the 23:16 MDT snapshot.
Keeping all bridge, interval, release, and power wording bounded by row-level evidence.

serial_gates.item: Choose #489 landing path: keep draft, split, or move toward review; do not call it release-ready.

#95 has landed; #101 has local merge-ref and live JuliaCall bridge evidence but still needs fresh PR checks before R bridge claim widening; current workflows leave only maintainer-approved branch/PR-event mutation or deferral.
Score power-pilot estimands before any coverage/power promotion.
Close claim, pkgdown, validation-register, and CI pacing gates before release wording.

parallel_lanes.parallel_with: dashboard JSON refresh and public-reader audit
parallel_lanes.join_gate: Only summarize runs after completion or explicit snapshot time.
Rose signoff before using dashboard language in public docs.
Fresh #101 PR checks; local live JuliaCall evidence is partial until CI agrees.
Merge/scoring of stores; no zero-exclusion shortcut.

parallel_lanes.parallel_with: bridge parity once examples are stable
parallel_lanes.join_gate: Only after bridge syntax and claim boundaries settle.
Separate C4/C5 issue split from bridge PR #489.

matrix.evidence: PR #489 is clean and green at 03fdda1: coevolution recovery 27727834498 and R-CMD-check 27727834488 both succeeded. GLLVM.jl #101 merge-ref 2cd8563 focused bridge slice passed 641/641 locally with Julia 1.10. gllvmTMB no-Julia bridge suite passed; live JuliaCall bridge suite passed locally against GLLVM.jl f7be594 with juliaup on PATH.
matrix.next_gate: Fresh GLLVM.jl #101 PR CI before widening claims; current workflow evidence requires maintainer-approved push/PR-event mutation or explicit deferral.

matrix.evidence: Point rows allowed; correlation intervals and richer extractors remain gated.
matrix.next_gate: Local live JuliaCall suite passed; interval wording remains blocked until #101 PR CI and interval semantics are covered.

matrix.evidence: LaunchAgent latest logged summary: 367010 / 480000 reps, 0/48 cells at cap; local scoring audit still shows low coverage and invalid zero-reject interpretation for Sigma_unit_diag.

Run 27722546237 completed successfully and pushed 5969f6f (run 108) to power-pilot-results; persisted store has 48 cells, 19776 reps, 1/48 cells at cap, signal mean coverage 0.745, pass94 3/24, pass95 0/24, null mean coverage-under-null 0.425, 28 flagged cells, and 27 coverage anomalies. Scheduled run 27735802023 is in progress at 0567cd7 with 38 completed-success jobs and 11 in-progress jobs at the 23:16 MDT snapshot; no new persisted-store or scoring evidence yet.
matrix.next_gate: Fisher/Curie scoring blocks promotion; workflow success and persistence are process evidence only.

matrix.evidence: Gaussian lane covered; non-Gaussian guard remains reserved.
matrix.next_gate: Family-specific recovery evidence before guard relaxation.
